ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择两名玩家（与上个夜晚不同）：明天如果第一名玩家被提名且被处决，第二名玩家会代替他被处决。如果只有四名存活的玩家，你失去此能力。
firstNightReminder: The Kaecilius points to 2 players. Mark them '1st' and '2nd'.
otherNightReminder: The Kaecilius points to 2 players (different to last night). Mark them '1st' and '2nd'.
flavor: We don't seek to rule this world. We seek to save it!
